code: import axios from"axios";const API=axios.create({baseURL:"/api/interview"});export const generateQuestions=(role,resume)=>API.post("/generate-questions",{role,resume});export const evaluateAnswer=(sessionId,questionNumber,question,answer,role)=>API.post("/evaluate-answer",{sessionId,questionNumber,question,answer,role});export const finalizeSession=sessionId=>API.post("/finalize-session",{sessionId});export const getSession=sessionId=>API.get(`/sessions/${sessionId}`);export const getAllSessions=()=>API.get("/sessions");export const deleteSession=sessionId=>API.delete(`/sessions/${sessionId}`);
